column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with elite reliability, hitting safely in over 77% of games and showing a recent uptick at the plate. He opens at home atop the order with a favorable platoon edge against Ryan Feltner, making him the clear top option for consistency. Bobby Witt Jr. also brings a strong hit rate and platoon advantage, but lacks Arraez’s steady contact profile. Michael Harris II and others trail slightly in both matchup and recent form.
